summary.short_summary: This chapter introduces the main ideas of Timeline and Sources of History in socialscience.
summary.detailed_summary: This chapter for Class 6 socialscience explains the core concepts of Timeline and Sources of History. It is intended as a structured study summary for CBSE learners.
